email_attachments.filename: Public Information Request - District-Level Pregnancy Related Services Data (PEIMS).eml
Public Information Request - District-Level Pregnancy Related Services Data (PEIMS)-1.eml

cross_reference_notes: Five CSV files organized by year/period (PRU_11507_21 through _25). Each contains the same 6 columns: YEAR, DISTRICT, DISTNAME, PREGNANT_CTE_STUDENTS, SINGLEPAR_CTE_STUDENTS, ELIG_PREG_REL_SVCS_DAYS. Data covers district-level CTE student counts for pregnant students, single-parent students, and eligible pregnancy-related services days. The .eml files appear to be the original PIR correspondence (sent and received copies).
